purpose: V2 도깨비 마스코트 4장 재생성 — SDXL 친화적 어휘로 prompt 변환 (yokai/ogre/kawaii). HF에 적합한 한국 LoRA 없어 대안 진행.
negative_prompt_default: text, letters, watermark, signature, photorealistic, scary, blood, low quality, blurry, multiple characters, group, crowd

items.prompt: cute chibi ogre mascot character, single character centered, kawaii flat sticker illustration, big round eyes, small horns, mischievous smile, vibrant yellow background, bold outlines, simple shapes, mobile app sticker style
kawaii red goblin mascot character, single character centered, flat sticker illustration, two tiny horns, cheerful pose, deep red background with gold accent, bold black outlines, simple flat colors
chubby cute yokai monster mascot, single character centered, kawaii flat illustration style, big eyes wide grin, pink background, bold outlines, mobile sticker design, full body visible

tiny cartoon demon mascot character, single character centered, kawaii sticker style, holding small lightning bolt, navy blue background with star accent, bold outlines, flat colors, isolated on background
items.note: 번개 든 미니 도깨비. 다크 톤.

delivery.report_format: Mac에 결과 보고 후 도깨비 채택 여부 결정
